overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a neon-lit apartment with a large octopus mural, interaction with Judy Alvarez by the window overlooking Night City, and movement through the living space into a graffiti-covered hallway. The scene transitions between purple neon interior lighting and bright natural sunlight from the window.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment living room with octopus mural

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit living room, observing the large octopus mural and curved sofa

entered.detail: large blue octopus tentacle mural covering the wall with dramatic lighting
modern curved sofa with purple upholstery and cushions
round coffee table with glowing purple items and a gun on top
purple neon light strip casting colored light on the ceiling
large window with intense sunlight streaming into the room

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cyberpunk apartment living room dominated by a massive blue octopus mural on the wall. Purple neon lighting illuminates the space, highlighting a curved sofa and circular coffee table. The camera moves slowly through the room toward a bright window on the right, revealing the contrast between the artificial interior lighting and natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment window area with character interaction

events.description: approaching Judy by the window where dialogue options appear on screen
bright natural sunlight from window becomes dominant over purple neon interior lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching Judy Alvarez by the window to initiate conversation, dialogue choices visible on screen

notable_agents.action: Judy Alvarez with purple and green hair standing by the window, turning to face the player

entered.detail: character with purple and green hair wearing a tank top, leaning against the window frame
wall covered with colorful cyberpunk posters including 'Below Deck' and 'Divide by Zero'
cluttered desk with electronic equipment, monitor, and desk lamp

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches Judy standing by the window, revealing a wall of vibrant cyberpunk posters and a desk cluttered with electronic equipment. Dialogue options appear as the player interacts with her. The lighting shifts dramatically from purple neon to bright natural sunlight streaming through the window, offering the first clear views of the futuristic city outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise apartment window view of futuristic metropolis

events.description: camera focuses on the cityscape view through the window, revealing Night City skyline

agents.ego_description: looking out the window at the cityscape, panning across the skyline to take in the view

entered.detail: dense futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and industrial smokestacks
elevated highway with moving vehicles and traffic visible below the apartment
tall buildings with neon signs, construction cranes, and glass facades

segments.scene_description: The camera pans across the panoramic view of Night City from the apartment window, showcasing a dense futuristic metropolis with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and busy highways. The bright midday sun illuminates the industrial and commercial buildings, with steam rising from various structures. The interior elements fade from view as the focus shifts entirely to the sprawling urban landscape outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment interior with workspace and kitchenette

events.description: turning away from the window back into the neon-lit apartment interior

agents.ego_description: turning away from the window and moving through the apartment, passing the desk and kitchen area

notable_agents.action: Judy remains by the window as the player turns away to explore the room

entered.detail: red illuminated vending machine with 'NC' logo and glowing selection buttons
kitchen area with bar stools and yellow neon under-cabinet lighting
dark hallway entrance with blue graffiti visible on the walls

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the city view and moves back into the apartment interior, revealing a red vending machine, a kitchen area with yellow neon under-lighting, and a desk cluttered with electronic equipment. The lighting returns to the purple and cyan neon tones as the camera moves away from the window, heading toward a dark hallway entrance at the back of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow apartment hallway with graffiti art

events.description: entering the narrow hallway from the main living area

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow hallway toward the back of the apartment

entered.detail: dimly lit hallway with concrete floors and walls painted with graffiti
walls painted with abstract blue and white graffiti art and drips
fluorescent light fixtures on the ceiling providing dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, dimly lit hallway with blue and white graffiti covering the concrete walls. The space is enclosed with industrial flooring and fluorescent ceiling lights, creating a stark, gritty contrast to the neon-lit living room. The camera moves steadily forward through the corridor, leaving the main apartment areas behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk apartment that opens up to a panoramic city view before retreating into a gritty industrial hallway. It begins in a living room dominated by a massive blue octopus mural and purple neon lighting, moving slowly past a curved sofa toward a bright window. As the camera approaches Judy and her cluttered workspace, the artificial glow shifts dramatically into bright natural sunlight that reveals a sprawling metropolis of towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The scene then turns away from the midday sun and the urban landscape, gliding back through the interior past a red vending machine and yellow under-lighting as the purple and cyan tones return. Finally, the camera leaves the main living space behind, entering a narrow, dimly lit corridor where blue and white graffiti covers the concrete walls under flickering fluorescent lights.
